yaml_definition:
name: search_orders
description: Search and list orders with optional filtering by order name, ID, user, or date
method: GET
url: /api/orders
parameters:
  type: object
  properties:
    name:
      type: string
      description: 订单名称
      in: query
    id:
      type: string
      description: 订单ID (Order ID)
      in: query
    user:
      type: string
      description: 下单人
      in: query
    date:
      type: string
      description: 下单时间
      in: query
  required: []
response:
  type: object
  properties:
    data:
      type: array
      description: List of orders matching the search criteria
      items:
        type: object
        properties:
          id:
            type: string
            description: 订单ID (Order ID)
          name:
            type: string
            description: 订单名称
          user:
            type: string
            description: 下单人
          amount:
            type: integer
            description: 订单金额
          status:
            type: string
            description: 订单状态, shipped, pending, cancelled)
          time:
            type: string
            description: 下单时间
    total:
      type: integer
      description: Total number of orders matching the search criteria
name: search_orders
description: Search and list orders with optional filtering by order name, ID, user, or date

data.description: List of orders matching the search criteria

status.description: 订单状态, shipped, pending, cancelled)

total.description: Total number of orders matching the search criteria
